name: Perfectly Chocolate Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter, granulated sugar, and brown sugar with an electric mixer until creamy.
4. Add vanilla extract and eggs; beat well.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in chocolate chips and chopped nuts (if using).
7. Using a rounded teaspoon, drop dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Allow cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet before transferring them to a wire rack.
10. Cool completely. Approximately 5 dozen cookies result from this recipe.
